name: 18" Storage Turntable - Brightroom™: Black Utility Storage Bin, 50% Recycled Plastic, 915 Volume Capacity
description:
Organize small household tools in this 18-Inch Storage Turntable from Brightroom™. Designed with an 18-inch diameter and raised sides, this storage turntable helps you maximize space in cabinets and corners, while the rotating design lets you easily access the items in the back. Showcasing a black hue that makes it easy to coordinate with different decor styles, it features two side cutout handles for easy carrying.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
